'''Clink''' was the nickname given to the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] assigned to [[Myn Donos]] during his time with [[Wraith Squadron]] after the destruction of his first astromech unit and fellow survivor of [[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon Squadron]], [[Shiner]].

{{Droid-stub}}
